reason: Item 05 is documentation and test-coverage closure for already-JAX-native curve adapters. The seven curve classes that expose `to_spec()` route through `curve_spec_from_curve` -> `curve_geometry_from_dofs` (`src/simsopt/jax_core/curve_geometry.py`), which is unchanged on the parent commit and current HEAD. `CurveXYZFourierSymmetries` continues to use its own `JaxCurve.gamma_jax` jit-compiled hot path; routing it through `curve_spec_from_curve` would require a source-side `CurveXYZFourierSymmetriesSpec` plus `to_spec()` and is recorded as an architecture-class blocker.

cited_existing_production_tests: tests/geo/test_curve.py (`Testing.curvetypes` parametrization covering CurveXYZFourierSymmetries{1,2,3} indirect kernel parity)

blocked_classes.detail: No `to_spec()` method and no `surf` attribute; `curve_spec_from_curve` raises NotImplementedError on parent commit a9da18fac. Routing requires a source-side `CurveXYZFourierSymmetriesSpec` plus `to_spec` which is out of scope for the item 05 closeout (test-only).

dense_materialization_budget.production_run_working_set: 4 curve classes x 4 coils x float64[64, 3] = 24 KiB transient working set; total under 0.5 MiB including spec dataclasses

validation.command: cd /tmp/simsopt-jax-item05-red/wt && JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu PYTHONPATH=src .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/geo/test_curve_item05_closeout.py -v  # parent a9da18fac
